## Agent name

<!-- kebab-case, domain-prefixed or general. e.g., `wp-security-scanner` -->

## Tier

- [ ] Tier 1 — haiku (fetches, counts, extracts observable data)
- [ ] Tier 2 — sonnet (scores, compares, classifies findings)
- [ ] Tier 3 — opus (reasons about strategy, positioning, action plans)

## What does it produce?

<!-- Describe the JSON output. What fields matter most? -->

## What skills would invoke it?

<!-- List existing or proposed skills that need this agent. An agent used by only one skill that won't be reused belongs in that skill, not here. -->

## Why not keep this logic inside a skill?

<!-- e.g., "Three skills all need to fetch and parse Google Business Profile data — extracting it into a shared agent avoids duplication." -->
